conversation.text: we build AI sales agents for WhatsApp. catches your leads instantly, qualifies them, books calls. runs 24/7 so nothing slips through after hours
scope based, depends what needs building. usually comes in under a month of ad spend though, 50/50 split. our founder Louis can give you an exact number on a quick call
